name: Reliabank Dakota
description_short: Community bank operating in South Dakota since 1920, offering checking, savings, mortgages, personal loans, and business banking with multiple branch locations.
description_long:
Reliabank Dakota is a South Dakota-based community bank with roots dating back to 1920. The bank operates multiple locations across South Dakota including Sioux Falls, Watertown, Tea, and Estelline, positioning itself as a locally-focused financial institution with decision-making authority at the branch level.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of personal and business banking services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), personal loans, mortgages (purchase, new construction, and refinance), debit cards with contactless options, and credit card services through UChoose Rewards. On the business side, Reliabank provides agricultural banking with specialized ag lending, business checking, commercial loans, and merchant processing through Clover. Additional services include mobile banking apps for iOS and Android, digital payments via Zelle, investment services, insurance products, and wealth management.

Reliabank differentiates itself through community involvement and local decision-making. The bank emphasizes its agricultural banking expertise with dedicated ag specialists, offers instant-issue debit cards at select locations (same-day service at Sioux Falls, Watertown, Tea, and Estelline branches), and provides surcharge-free ATM access through its own network and MoneyPass ATMs nationwide. The bank also features a Super Eagles Club savings account for children ages 12 and under with a 0% introductory APR for 12 months, and maintains FDIC insurance backing.

As a traditional community bank, Reliabank is best suited for customers seeking personalized service and local lending decisions rather than those prioritizing the highest rates or most digital-first banking experience. The bank's strength in agricultural lending makes it particularly valuable for farming operations. However, customers should note that branch availability is limited to South Dakota locations, and the website does not prominently display current interest rates or fee schedules, which are important factors for comparison shopping. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Debit cards with contactless and instant-issue options
Business checking and business banking solutions
Credit cards with UChoose Rewards program
pros: FDIC insured deposits with full faith and credit backing
Instant-issue debit cards available same-day at 5 designated branch locations
Surcharge-free ATM access at Reliabank and all MoneyPass ATM locations nationwide
Specialized agricultural banking with local loan decision-making and ag specialists
Multiple digital banking channels including free mobile apps for iPhone, iPad, and Android devices
Contactless debit card options for safer transactions
Long-established institution (operating since 1920) with community roots and involvement
Zelle integration for digital payments and transfers
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to South Dakota locations only
Website does not display current interest rates, APYs, or fee schedules for comparison
Instant-issue debit cards only available at 5 branches; other locations require 2-3 day mail delivery
No mention of online account opening or fully digital banking onboarding for new customers
best_for: Agricultural businesses and farmers seeking specialized lending with local decision-making
South Dakota residents and businesses wanting community bank personalized service
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured deposits and surcharge-free ATM access nationwide
diagnosis: Reliabank Dakota is best for South Dakota-based customers and agricultural businesses seeking community bank service with local lending decisions and FDIC protection. The main caveat is geographic limitation to South Dakota and lack of transparent rate/fee information online, requiring in-branch or direct contact for specific product details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
